title: Mnemosyne record (base envelope)
description: Every record written to state/mnemosyne/<kind>.jsonl has this envelope shape. Per-kind bodies are validated against their own schema (see themis.schemas()).

kind.description: The kind of record (dotted, e.g. 'prophecy.verified'). Filename is sanitized via Mnemosyne._file_for().

actor.description: Who or what wrote this record. By convention 'tier:name' or just the figure's name.

body.description: Per-kind structured payload. Validated against per-kind schema if one is registered.

remembered_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp set by Mnemosyne at write time.
